interaction.prompt: Two defenders at the line, no clear pass. Dump-and-chase: where should you put the puck?

feedback.right: Strong-side corner. F2 is on the strong wall and gets there first — chase the dump-in and recover possession.
feedback.wrong: Dumps into open ice get retrieved by the goalie or D. Aim for the strong-side corner where your forechecker can win it.

tip: When you can't carry it in cleanly, dump TO the strong-side corner — your F2 wins the foot race.
why: Smart dump-ins put pressure on retrieval. The strong-side corner is hardest for the goalie to reach and gives your forechecker the angle.
